name: Ir_cluster_chr3R_64A_ionotropic
description: Drosophila chemoreceptor cluster: Ionotropic receptor (Ir) cluster (Ir64a, Ir75a/b/c) on chr3R — sister family to ORs, glutamate-receptor-derived. Drosophila uses three independent 7TM-like chemoreceptor families (Or, Gr, Ir), each with multiple tandem sub-clusters.
